opus_correction: Root cause: indicators dict is nested {core:{...}, advanced:{...}} but functions accessed top-level. EMA keys use ema21 not ema_21 and are nested under current_emas. bb_delta_5bar does not exist, use bb_acceleration instead.
opus_reasoning: Data structure mismatch between scan_ema_signals output format and consumer functions. Four separate key path errors compounding to zero score.

local_output: Trading system crashed after code changes
opus_correction: Crash was database corruption (WAL checkpoint disk I/O errors on trading_forex.db), not code changes. Recovery: sqlite3 .dump pipe to new db file. Code changes (story_score fix) were confirmed working before corruption started.
opus_reasoning: Log timeline analysis showed disk I/O errors preceded crash. STORY logs confirmed code was executing correctly. Separated correlation from causation.
